reviews.comment:
Nos quedamos con el auto a 29 km de Dolorez, nos fue a buscar la grúa
INCREIBLE que el aca no tenga taller, nos llevaron a 1 ....amigos,   donde nos mataron y además no lo arreglaron bien,,,llegando a caballo , otra vez se rompió el auto

(Translated by Google)
Our car broke down 29 km from Dolores, and a tow truck came to get us.
It's unbelievable that the place doesn't have a repair shop. They took us to a friend's place, where they ripped us off and didn't even fix it properly. We were arriving on horseback when the car broke down again.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNLaVllWGtRRRAB
